name: @ryzome-ai/hermes-ryzome
description: Ryzome Hermes plugin runner and Python plugin assets

scripts.test: vitest run && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 -m unittest discover -s tests
scripts.lint: biome lint package.json tsconfig.json biome.json vitest.config.ts src && tsc --noEmit
scripts.lint:check: biome lint --diagnostic-level=error package.json tsconfig.json biome.json vitest.config.ts src
scripts.format: biome format --write package.json tsconfig.json biome.json vitest.config.ts src
scripts.format:check: biome format package.json tsconfig.json biome.json vitest.config.ts src
